name: Wool Sort: Yarn Color Puzzle
description: Sort the colorful yarn balls into matching tubes in this cozy knitting puzzle! Move wool balls between glass tubes to group them by color. With 50 levels, 3 difficulty modes and satisfying boing animations, Wool Sort: Yarn Color Puzzle is the most relaxing brain-teaser around. Knit it together!
instructions: Tap a tube to pick yarn balls tap another to move them Sort all colors to win
